name: ViewMarkBasicTagAttributes
summary: The ViewMarkBasicTagAttributes class contains basic attributes for view mark tags.

constructors.name: ViewMarkBasicTagAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new mark tag attributes instance.

constructors.name: ViewMarkBasicTagAttributes(Vector, TagLocation, ContainerElement)
constructors.signature: public ViewMarkBasicTagAttributes(Vector offset, TagLocation location, ContainerElement tagContent)
constructors.summary: Creates a new mark tag attributes instance with the given offset, location and content.

params.name: offset
params.doc: The offset of the mark tag to be used.

params.name: location
params.doc: The location of the mark tag to be used.

params.name: tagContent
params.doc: The content of the mark tag to be used.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: Location
properties.summary: The location of the mark tag.

properties.name: Offset
properties.summary: The offset of the mark tag.
